title: PokeSize - Cobblemon Size Changer
body:
**Take Control of Size and Make Your Pokémon Unique!** ✨
_Ever feel like your Gyarados is missing that extra touch of intimidation? Or dreamed of an Eevee that fits perfectly in your pocket? Stop dreaming and make it a reality with PokeSize!_

PokeSize is the ultimate server-side mod for Cobblemon that puts the power of size right in your hands. Transform your companions, from making your starter an imposing colossus to turning your favorite into an adorable, miniature sidekick. This mod is the perfect tool to bring a new dimension to your adventure.

**Why You Need PokeSize**:
✨ Total Customization: Express yourself! Adapt the size of each Pokémon on your team to fit your style. Create epic stories with a gigantic Snorlax blocking a path or share your journeys with the smallest, most adorable Spheal.

⚙️ **Control for Admins**: Do you run a server? PokeSize is your new best friend. Reward your players with uniquely sized Pokémon, create events with colossal bosses, or simply add a touch of exclusivity to your world. It's all managed with a simple and powerful permission system.

🧐 **Simple and Elegant**: Forget complicated menus or unnecessary items. With a single command, /pokesize, players with permissions can use presets like 'giant' or 'tiny', while admins have absolute control to designate any player and set a precise numerical scale.

🌐 100% Server-Side: The best part! Players don't need to install anything to join a server using PokeSize. Fewer complications and more fun for everyone.

📜 Changelog & Quick Guide
v1.0.0 - Initial Release (October 6, 2025) 🚀

This is the first public release of PokeSize. The mod has been built from the ground up to be a lightweight, permissions-based utility for server owners and players.

🔑 Commands & Permissions:

The mod's functionality is handled by a single command, /pokesize, which behaves differently based on permissions.

👤 For Users:

Required Permission: pokesize.user

Command: /pokesize <slot> <size_name>

Description: Allows players to change the size of their own Pokémon using presets (tiny, small, giant, etc.). The slot is a number from 1 to 6.

Example: /pokesize 1 giant

👑 For Administrators:

Required Permission: pokesize.admin

Command: /pokesize <player> <slot> <scale>

Description: Allows admins to target any player and set a precise numerical scale from 0.1 to 10.0.

Example: /pokesize f0cus 2 5.0




> I have a private version that includes items to make the Pokémon experience even more realistic. It adds items to ranks, shops, and rewards... and allows you to modify the size of your companions.
>  
> You can modify the item's name, description, and texture.
> For more information, visit my Discord.

@f0cus https://discord.gg/nW4PADWamk
